outputs.main.sas:
# Load required libraries
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(haven)
library(xportr)

# Read SDTM source datasets
dm <- read_xpt("sdtm/dm.xpt")
lb <- read_xpt("sdtm/lb.xpt")
vs <- read_xpt("sdtm/vs.xpt")
ex <- read_xpt("sdtm/ex.xpt")
ds <- read_xpt("sdtm/ds.xpt")

# Read ADSL
adsl <- read_xpt("adam/adsl.xpt")

# Derive ADSL variables needed for ADLBC
adsl_vars <- adsl %>%
  select(STUDYID, USUBJID, TRTSDT, TRTEDT, TRT01PN, TRT01P, TRT01AN, TRT01A,
         ITTFL, SAFFL, EFFFL, COMP24FL, AGE, AGEGR1, AGEGR1N, RACE, RACEN, SEX,
         HEIGHTBL, WEIGHTBL, BMIBL, MMSETOT)

# Merge LB with ADSL
adlbc <- lb %>%
  left_join(adsl_vars, by = c("STUDYID", "USUBJID"))

# Filter for lab chemistry parameters (LBCAT = "CHEMISTRY")
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  filter(LBCAT == "CHEMISTRY")

# Derive PARAMCD and PARAM
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    PARAMCD = LBTESTCD,
    PARAM = case_when(
      LBTESTCD == "ALB" ~ "Albumin (g/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "ALP" ~ "Alkaline Phosphatase (U/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "ALT" ~ "Alanine Aminotransferase (U/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "AST" ~ "Aspartate Aminotransferase (U/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "BILI" ~ "Bilirubin (umol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "BUN" ~ "Blood Urea Nitrogen (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "CA" ~ "Calcium (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "CHOL" ~ "Cholesterol (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "CK" ~ "Creatine Kinase (U/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "CL" ~ "Chloride (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "CREAT" ~ "Creatinine (umol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "GGT" ~ "Gamma Glutamyl Transferase (U/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "GLUC" ~ "Glucose (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "HBA1C" ~ "Hemoglobin A1C (%)",
      LBTESTCD == "HDL" ~ "HDL Cholesterol (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "K" ~ "Potassium (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "LDL" ~ "LDL Cholesterol (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "LDH" ~ "Lactate Dehydrogenase (U/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "MG" ~ "Magnesium (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "NA" ~ "Sodium (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "PHOS" ~ "Phosphorus (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "PROT" ~ "Total Protein (g/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "TRIG" ~ "Triglycerides (mmol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "URATE" ~ "Urate (umol/L)",
      LBTESTCD == "UREA" ~ "Urea (mmol/L)",
      TRUE ~ LBTESTCD
    )
  )

# Derive AVAL and AVALC
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    AVAL = LBSTRESN,
    AVALC = as.character(LBSTRESC)
  )

# Derive analysis date and relative day
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    ADT = LBDTC,
    ADY = as.numeric(difftime(LBDTC, TRTSDT, units = "days"))
  )

# Derive visit variables
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    AVISIT = VISIT,
    AVISITN = VISITNUM
  )

# Derive baseline values
# First, identify baseline records (VISITNUM == 0 or VISIT == "BASELINE")
adlbc_base <- adlbc %>%
  filter(VISITNUM == 0 | VISIT == "BASELINE") %>%
  select(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD, AVAL) %>%
  rename(BASE = AVAL)

# Merge baseline back
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  left_join(adlbc_base, by = c("STUDYID", "USUBJID", "PARAMCD"))

# Derive change from baseline
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    CHG = AVAL - BASE,
    PCHG = ifelse(BASE != 0, 100 * CHG / BASE, NA_real_)
  )

# Derive reference range indicators
# ANRIND: Analysis Reference Range Indicator (post-baseline)
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    ANRIND = case_when(
      AVAL < LBSTNRLO ~ "LOW",
      AVAL > LBSTNRHI ~ "HIGH",
      AVAL >= LBSTNRLO & AVAL <= LBSTNRHI ~ "NORMAL",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# BNRIND: Baseline Reference Range Indicator
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    BNRIND = case_when(
      BASE < LBSTNRLO ~ "LOW",
      BASE > LBSTNRHI ~ "HIGH",
      BASE >= LBSTNRLO & BASE <= LBSTNRHI ~ "NORMAL",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Derive SHIFT variable
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    SHIFT = ifelse(!is.na(BNRIND) & !is.na(ANRIND),
                   paste(BNRIND, "to", ANRIND),
                   NA_character_)
  )

# Derive analysis flags
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    ANL01FL = case_when(
      !is.na(AVAL) & !is.na(BASE) & AVISITN > 0 ~ "Y",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Derive treatment variables
adlbc <- adlbc %>%
  mutate(
    TRTP = TRT01P,
    TRTPN = TRT01PN,
    TRTA = TRT01A,
    TRTAN = TRT01AN
  )

# Select and order variables per ADaM specification
adlbc_final <- adlbc %>%
  select(
    STUDYID,
    USUBJID,
    SUBJID,
    SITEID,
    SITEGR1,
    TRTP,
    TRTPN,
    TRTA,
    TRTAN,
    TRTSDT,
    TRTEDT,
    AGE,
    AGEGR1,
    AGEGR1N,
    RACE,
    RACEN,
    SEX,
    HEIGHTBL,
    WEIGHTBL,
    BMIBL,
    MMSETOT,
    ITTFL,
    SAFFL,
    EFFFL,
    COMP24FL,
    PARAMCD,
    PARAM,
    AVAL,
    AVALC,
    BASE,
    CHG,
    PCHG,
    AVISIT,
    AVISITN,
    ADT,
    ADY,
    ANRIND,
    BNRIND,
    SHIFT,
    ANL01FL,
    LBSEQ,
    LBTESTCD,
    LBTEST,
    LBCAT,
    LBORRES,
    LBORRESU,
    LBSTRESC,
    LBSTRESN,
    LBSTRESU,
    LBSTNRLO,
    LBSTNRHI,
    LBSTNRC,
    LBNRIND,
    VISIT,
    VISITNUM,
    LBDTC,
    LBDY,
    LBBLFL
  ) %>%
  arrange(STUDYID, USUBJID, PARAMCD, AVISITN)

# Apply variable labels
attr(adlbc_final$STUDYID, "label") <- "Study Identifier"
attr(adlbc_final$USUBJID, "label") <- "Unique Subject Identifier"
attr(adlbc_final$SUBJID, "label") <- "Subject Identifier for the Study"
attr(adlbc_final$SITEID, "label") <- "Study Site Identifier"
attr(adlbc_final$SITEGR1, "label") <- "Pooled Site Group 1"
attr(adlbc_final$TRTP, "label") <- "Planned Treatment for Period 01"
attr(adlbc_final$TRTPN, "label") <- "Planned Treatment for Period 01 (N)"
attr(adlbc_final$TRTA, "label") <- "Actual Treatment for Period 01"
attr(adlbc_final$TRTAN, "label") <- "Actual Treatment for Period 01 (N)"
attr(adlbc_final$TRTSDT, "label") <- "Date of First Exposure to Treatment"
attr(adlbc_final$TRTEDT, "label") <- "Date of Last Exposure to Treatment"
attr(adlbc_final$AGE, "label") <- "Age"
attr(adlbc_final$AGEGR1, "label") <- "Pooled Age Group 1"
attr(adlbc_final$AGEGR1N, "label") <- "Pooled Age Group 1 (N)"
attr(adlbc_final$RACE, "label") <- "Race"
attr(adlbc_final$RACEN, "label") <- "Race (N)"
attr(adlbc_final$SEX, "label") <- "Sex"
attr(adlbc_final$HEIGHTBL, "label") <- "Height at Baseline (cm)"
attr(adlbc_final$WEIGHTBL, "label") <- "Weight at Baseline (kg)"
attr(adlbc_final$BMIBL, "label") <- "BMI at Baseline (kg/m2)"
attr(adlbc_final$MMSETOT, "label") <- "MMSE Total"
attr(adlbc_final$ITTFL, "label") <- "Intent-to-Treat Population Flag"
attr(adlbc_final$SAFFL, "label") <- "Safety Population Flag"
attr(adlbc_final$EFFFL, "label") <- "Efficacy Population Flag"
attr(adlbc_final$COMP24FL, "label") <- "Completers of Week 24 Population Flag"
attr(adlbc_final$PARAMCD, "label") <- "Parameter Code"
attr(adlbc_final$PARAM, "label") <- "Parameter"
attr(adlbc_final$AVAL, "label") <- "Analysis Value"
attr(adlbc_final$AVALC, "label") <- "Analysis Value (C)"
attr(adlbc_final$BASE, "label") <- "Baseline Value"
attr(adlbc_final$CHG, "label") <- "Change from Baseline"
attr(adlbc_final$PCHG, "label") <- "Percent Change from Baseline"
attr(adlbc_final$AVISIT, "label") <- "Analysis Visit"
attr(adlbc_final$AVISITN, "label") <- "Analysis Visit (N)"
attr(adlbc_final$ADT, "label") <- "Analysis Date"
attr(adlbc_final$ADY, "label") <- "Analysis Relative Day"
attr(adlbc_final$ANRIND, "label") <- "Analysis Reference Range Indicator"
attr(adlbc_final$BNRIND, "label") <- "Baseline Reference Range Indicator"
attr(adlbc_final$SHIFT, "label") <- "Shift from Baseline to Post-Baseline Reference Range Category"
attr(adlbc_final$ANL01FL, "label") <- "Analysis Flag 01"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSEQ, "label") <- "Sequence Number"
attr(adlbc_final$LBTESTCD, "label") <- "Lab Test Code"
attr(adlbc_final$LBTEST, "label") <- "Lab Test Name"
attr(adlbc_final$LBCAT, "label") <- "Lab Category"
attr(adlbc_final$LBORRES, "label") <- "Original Result"
attr(adlbc_final$LBORRESU, "label") <- "Original Units"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSTRESC, "label") <- "Standardized Result (C)"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSTRESN, "label") <- "Standardized Result (N)"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSTRESU, "label") <- "Standardized Units"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSTNRLO, "label") <- "Reference Range Lower Limit"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSTNRHI, "label") <- "Reference Range Upper Limit"
attr(adlbc_final$LBSTNRC, "label") <- "Reference Range Comment"
attr(adlbc_final$LBNRIND, "label") <- "Reference Range Indicator"
attr(adlbc_final$VISIT, "label") <- "Visit Name"
attr(adlbc_final$VISITNUM, "label") <- "Visit Number"
attr(adlbc_final$LBDTC, "label") <- "Date/Time of Collection"
attr(adlbc_final$LBDY, "label") <- "Study Day of Collection"
attr(adlbc_final$LBBLFL, "label") <- "Baseline Flag"

# Apply dataset label
attr(adlbc_final, "label") <- "Analysis Dataset Lab Blood Chemistry"

# Write to xpt file
xportr_write(adlbc_final, path = "adam/adlbc.xpt", metadata = NULL)
